design_philosophy.archetype: The Performance Pro (Nutritional Precision) mixed with Organic & Earthy (Fresh Ingredients)
design_philosophy.visual_direction: Dark Mode Gourmet - High contrast, slate backgrounds, vibrant food colors, glassmorphism.

layout_strategies.container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-slate-950 text-slate-50 relative overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-600 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(16,185,129,0.6)] active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium border border-slate-700 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-white/10 text-slate-300 hover:text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.glass: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden
cards.interactive: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-lg hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-all cursor-pointer active:scale-[0.98]

inputs.base: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500/50 transition-all

badges.base: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase

images.alt: Fresh gourmet salad on dark background

specific_instructions: Refactor App.js to use Tailwind utility classes instead of inline styles where possible.
Implement 'Glassmorphism' for the main camera overlay and result cards.
Use the 'Emerald' green as the primary action color (Shutter button, CTA) to signify 'Fresh/Healthy'.
Replace the solid dark background with a deep Slate (#0f172a) and add a subtle noise texture or gradient blob to create depth.
Use Playfair Display for the 'SoulNutri' logo and section headings (Nutri News, Weekly Report).
Ensure the camera view has a premium 'Frame' - maybe a thin glowing border or corner brackets.
Weekly Report should look like a 'Gourmet Menu' or 'Sommelier List' - elegant list items.
Nutri News should use a Bento Grid layout for visual interest.
Add a 'Freshness' indicator visual - maybe a leaf icon or a water droplet effect.
Maintain the existing 'Dark Mode' constraint but elevate it to 'Luxury Dining' (Slate/Stone) rather than 'Matrix Black'.
For the 'Camera Error' state, use a friendly, helpful illustration or icon, not just text.
Optimize for mobile: Touch targets must be at least 44px (p-4 or h-12).
Data-testid attributes are mandatory for all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry where appropriate.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical (p-6, p-8) for a luxury feel.
Micro-animations are required for all interactions (hover, click, load).
Never use pure black (#000000) or pure white (#ffffff) for large backgrounds. Use tinted neutrals.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (APCA/WCAG AA).
